data.title: Lilly's next-gen weight loss therapy succeeds in late-stage trial for diabetes
data.description:
Eli Lilly (LLY) announced on Thursday that a late-stage trial for its next-gen weight loss therapy, retatrutide, reached the primary and all secondary endpoints in adults with type 2 diabetes.

Citing topline data from its TRANSCEND-T2D-1 Phase 3 study, Lilly (LLY) said that the trial met the primary endpoint as patients who received retatrutide experienced up to a 2.0% average decline in A1C, a diabetes biomarker, over 40 weeks.

The placebo-controlled study was designed to evaluate the triple hormone receptor agonist in 4 mg, 9 mg, or 12 mg doses in adults with type 2 diabetes who had insufficient glucose control despite dietary measures and exercise.

As for the secondary endpoint, the company noted that patients on the once-weekly injectable lost up to an average of 36.6 lbs., indicating up to ~17% of weight loss, and their weight loss effects continued throughout the trial period.

As for safety, the drug led to adverse events similar to those seen in clinical studies for other incretin-based therapies, such as Lilly’s (LLY) own weight loss therapy, tirzepatide, marketed as Zepbound. However, 2.2%, 4.5%, and 5.1% of patients who received retatrutide at 4 mg, 9 mg, and 12 mg, respectively, dropped out due to adverse events, compared to none in the placebo group.

The Indiana-based drugmaker plans to release additional data from TRANSCEND-T2D next year. Detailed results from the study will be submitted for publication in a peer-reviewed journal and presented at a medical event in June.

data.title: Tilray reports major expansion of medical cannabis portfolio in Australia
data.description:
• Tilray Medical, a division of Tilray Brands (TLRY) on Thursday announced its largest portfolio expansion in Australia to date.  
  • Tilray Medical has operated in Australia for several years, supplying EU‑GMP certified medical cannabis through established prescriber, pharmacy, and clinical distribution channels.
  • This latest expansion represents a scaled increase in Tilray’s local portfolio aligned with rising demand across Australia’s regulated medical system and Tilray’s continued commitment to supply reliable and compliant medical cannabis.
  • Over the coming months, Tilray Medical Australia will expand its medical cannabis portfolio with the introduction of new products across multiple formats under its Redecan and Good Supply brands, further enhancing treatment options for healthcare professionals and patients.

data.title: Satellogic gives Q4 results
data.description:
• Satellogic Inc. press release (SATL): Q4 GAAP EPS of -$0.18, may not be comparable to estimates.
  • Revenue of $6.2M beats by $2.37M.

data.title: Yiren Digital gives Q4 results
data.description:
• Yiren Digital press release (YRD): Q4 GAAP EPADS of $1.439
  • Revenue of RMB 957.6M (-34.0% Y/Y).
  • Net cash used in operating activities in the fourth quarter of 2025 was RMB197.6 million (US$28.3 million), compared to RMB373.0 million generated from operating activities in the same period of 2024.
  • As of December 31, 2025, cash and cash equivalents were RMB3,348.1 million (US$478.8 million), compared to RMB3,841.3 million as of December 31, 2024. 
  • Gross written premiums in the fourth quarter of 2025 were RMB860.1 million (US$123.0 million), representing a decrease of 25% from RMB1,148.0 million in the third quarter of 2025 and a decrease of 22% compared to RMB1,100.3 million in the same period of 2024.

data.title: Palantir, Moder co-develop AI-powered mortgage operations platform
data.description:
• Palantir Technologies (PLTR) is partnering with Moder, an AI and technology outsourcing company in mortgage, to co-build an AI-powered mortgage operations platform.
  • The co-built platform leverages Palantir’s Ontology to provide an agentic AI framework to integrate with existing systems of record. By translating guidelines and operational policies into configurable, testable, and auditable rules, the new platform is designed to help teams execute critical processes with greater precision and scale.
  • In early deployments with the first pilot customer, Freedom Mortgage, the platform has shown to drive meaningful value through improved speed and accuracy, benefiting operating agents and homeowners.
  • PLTR --0.89% premarket to $151.4
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Lithium Americas GAAP EPS of $0.50

data.title: AECOM secures position on $151B U.S. MDA SHIELD contract
data.description:
• AECOM (ACM) has been awarded a position on the U.S. Missile Defense Agency’s Scalable Homeland Innovative Enterprise Layered Defense (SHIELD) indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity contract.
  • With a ceiling of $151B, the SHIELD contract covers a full spectrum of professional services for facility modernization, supporting operational readiness of the agency’s critical defense infrastructure.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: 3M, Bain Capital to acquire Madison Fire & Rescue for $1.95B
data.description:
3M (MMM) is partnering with investment firm Bain Capital to acquire Madison Fire & Rescue from Madison Industries for $1.95B.

Under the terms of the transaction, 3M and Bain Capital will establish a new joint venture in which 3M will contribute Scott Safety, receive $700M of cash proceeds upon closing, and own 50.1% of the new company, with Bain Capital owning 49.9%.

The transaction is expected to close in the second half of 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.

Madison Fire & Rescue offers a premier portfolio in rescue technology and fire suppression, including products offered under the Holmatro, Amkus, Task Force Tips, Fire Fighting Systems, and Waterax brands.

"This strategic transaction broadens 3M's safety portfolio, one of our priority verticals, by expanding our market reach and building scale for future growth," said William Brown, chairman and CEO. "It positions us to enhance margins and generate strong free cash flow, and enables continued investment in innovations that create value for customers and shareholders."

Source: Press Release
